items.title_en: Om Malik has died
items.title_zh: Om Malik 去世
items.summary_en: Tech journalism loses a distinctive voice with the passing of Om Malik, a longtime commentator and founder of a notable tech publication. His work helped shape Silicon Valley discourse and investor-friendly analysis during a pivotal era of tech growth.
items.summary_zh: Om Malik 的离世让科技新闻界失去一位独特观点的记者。他长期推动硅谷话语体系，并以投资者友好的分析风格影响了科技黄金时期的讨论。

items.title_en: Why current LLM costs are not sustainable
items.title_zh: 为什么当前大型语言模型成本不可持续
items.summary_en: Current LLM costs for real-world inference and serving are rising faster than value. The piece calls out compute, storage, and energy as the bottlenecks and suggests strategies such as model optimization, selective inference, and smarter deployment to curb expenses.
items.summary_zh: 当前大型语言模型在推理与部署上的成本上升，难以持续。文章指出计算、存储与能源是瓶颈，并提出模型优化、按需推理与更高效部署等降低成本的思路。

items.title_en: The 'papers, please' era of the internet will decimate your privacy
items.title_zh: 互联网的“请出示证件”时代将侵蚀你的隐私
items.summary_en: As services demand more identity checks and credentialing, pervasive surveillance and data collection erode personal privacy. The piece argues that the future internet will track who you are across apps, payments, and services, unless privacy-preserving authentication tools gain traction, such as zero-knowledge proofs and selective disclosure.
items.summary_zh: 随着各类服务越来越依赖身份验证，隐私将被广泛监控和数据化。文章提示，未来的互联网将跨应用、跨支付持续跟踪个人身份，除非引入如零知识证明等隐私保护的身份认证方案来抵消这种趋势。

items.title_en: An entire Herculaneum scroll has been read for the first time
items.title_zh: 整卷赫库伦尼亚卷轴首次被解读
items.summary_en: Researchers have read an entire Herculaneum scroll for the first time, using imaging and computer reconstruction to recover texts long hidden inside carbonized parchment. The achievement demonstrates advances in non-destructive archaeology and could unlock more ancient writings from the disaster-stricken library.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员首次通过成像与重建，完整解读了赫库伦尼亚卷轴中被碳化羊皮包裹的文本。此项突破体现数字考古的进步，未来可能揭示更多古罗马文献及日常生活细节。

items.title_en: We All Depend on Open Source. We Will Defend It Together
items.title_zh: 我们都依赖开源，我们将共同捍卫它
items.summary_en: Open-source is portrayed as foundational infrastructure at risk from policy shifts and ecosystem fatigue. The piece calls for a united defense—reaffirming governance, funding, and collaboration across maintainers and users.
items.summary_zh: 文章强调开源作为基础设施的脆弱性，面对政策压力与生态疲劳。呼吁社区团结共同行动，强化治理、资金与协作。

items.title_en: Libre Barcode Project
items.title_zh: Libre Barcode 项目
items.summary_en: Libre Barcode Project offers open-source barcode fonts and related tooling, enabling free and permissive use in printing and software without proprietary licensing. By standardizing common barcode symbologies like Code 128 and EAN/UPC, it lowers cost and friction for startups, educators, and public sector deployments, while inviting community contributions.
items.summary_zh: Libre Barcode 项目提供开源条码字体与相关工具，使印刷和软件使用不再受限于专有许可。通过标准化常用的条码符号（如 Code 128 与 EAN/UPC），它为初创公司、教育机构和公共部门降低成本和使用门槛，同时欢迎社区贡献。

items.title_en: Show HN: I made Google Trends for Hacker News by indexing 18 years of comments
items.title_zh: Show HN：用 18 年评论做成 Hacker News 的 Google 趋势
items.summary_en: A hobbyist built a Google Trends-style tool for Hacker News by indexing 18 years of HN comments. It lets you track topic popularity, spikes around events, and compare keywords over time. Demonstrates how public datasets can be mined for long-term trend analysis without official APIs.
items.summary_zh: 一位热爱者通过对 18 年 Hacker News 评论进行索引，打造了一个类似 Google Trends 的趋势分析工具。它可以追踪话题热度、事件引发的峰值，并对比不同关键词在时间轴上的变化，展示了在没有官方 API 的情况下对公开数据进行长期趋势分析的可行性。

items.title_en: What happened after 2k people tried to hack my AI assistant
items.title_zh: 两千人尝试破解我的 AI 助手后的经历
items.summary_en: An experiment where roughly 2,000 testers tried to hack the author's AI assistant, pressing prompts to jailbreak, induce leaks, or extract hidden data. The post analyzes which defenses held—auditing prompts, controlling memory, and limiting tool access—and underscores practical security lessons for deploying chat-based AI.
items.summary_zh: 一篇博文记录大约两千人尝试破解作者的 AI 助手，包括诱导提示、越狱式请求和试图提取隐私数据等攻击手段。文中分析哪些防御有效——如严格的提示审计、对记忆的控制，以及对工具访问的限制——并给出将 AI 部署到生产环境中的实际安全教训。

items.title_en: Apple raises prices of MacBooks, iPads
items.title_zh: 苹果提高 MacBook 与 iPad 价格
items.summary_en: Apple raised prices on MacBooks and iPads, citing higher costs for memory and components. The move tightens premium device margins and could influence consumer purchasing behavior, particularly during upcoming refresh cycles.
items.summary_zh: 苹果因内存等组件成本上涨，提高了 MacBook 与 iPad 的定价。这一举措收窄了高端设备的利润空间，可能影响消费者在未来升级周期的购买决策。

items.title_en: Micron locks in historically high memory prices for five years
items.title_zh: 美光锁定五年历史高内存价格
items.summary_en: Micron reportedly locks in memory prices for five years at historically high levels, signaling sustained cost pressure for hardware makers and consumers. The move underlines broader supply-demand dynamics in DRAM/NAND markets.
items.summary_zh: 美光科技将五年高位记忆体价格锁定，显示对硬件厂商与消费者的持续成本压力。此举折射出DRAM/NAND市场的供需动态。

items.title_en: Framework's 10G Ethernet module exposes USB-C's complexity
items.title_zh: Framework 的 10G 以太网模组暴露了 USB-C 的复杂性
items.summary_en: The Framework 10G Ethernet module highlights the intricate realities of USB-C, from power delivery and alternate modes to lane negotiation and cable quality. This setup exposes edge cases and dependency on spec compliance, underscoring cautions for hardware designers.
items.summary_zh: Framework 的 10G 以太网模组凸显了 USB-C 的复杂性，涉及供电协商、替代模式、信道映射和线缆品质等多重要素。此举暴露了把高带宽网络接到 USB-C 时的边缘情况和对规范遵从的强依赖，对硬件设计者具有重要警示意义。

items.title_en: Half-Life 2 in a Browser
items.title_zh: 在浏览器中运行的《半条命 2》
items.summary_en: A browser-based recreation of Valve's classic runs Half-Life 2 in the browser, showcasing a WebAssembly/WebGL-style approach to bring a full 3D game to the web without native installs. The project highlights the browser’s growing capacity to host heavy games and preserve classic titles, while also pointing to the performance and licensing trade-offs of in-browser emulation.
items.summary_zh: 在浏览器里直接运行《半条命 2》的演示，展示了通过网页技术将完整 3D 游戏带入浏览器的可能。它凸显了浏览器承载重度游戏与保留经典作品的潜力，同时也暴露了实现此类功能时的性能与授权权衡。

items.title_en: The Garbage Collection Handbook: The Art of Automatic Memory Management (2nd Ed) (2023)
items.title_zh: 垃圾回收手册：自动内存管理的艺术（第2版）
items.summary_en: The Garbage Collection Handbook (2nd ed., 2023) is a thorough reference on automatic memory management, detailing garbage collection algorithms, memory models, and practical tuning across languages. It surveys tracing, reference counting, generational collectors, and real-world trade-offs, equipping developers to optimize latency, throughput, and memory safety.
items.summary_zh: 这本《垃圾回收手册》是对自动内存管理的全面指南，涵盖垃圾回收算法、内存模型以及跨语言的实用调优。书中比较了 tracing、引用计数、代际收集等不同方案的优劣，帮助开发者在性能、延迟和内存安全之间做出权衡。

items.title_en: IBM debuts sub-1 nanometer chip technology
items.title_zh: IBM 发布亚一纳米芯片技术
items.summary_en: IBM unveiled the world's first sub-1-nanometer chip technology, signaling a new scaling frontier for semiconductors. The approach could dramatically improve transistor density and energy efficiency, though practical manufacturing still faces significant challenges.
items.summary_zh: IBM 公布全球首个亚一纳米芯片技术，标志半导体在晶体管密度与能效方面迈入新阶段。初步成果显示有望继续推进摩尔定律的扩展，但在实际制造仍面临重大挑战。

items.title_en: Apple to skip high-end M6 Mac chips in favor of AI-focused M7 line
items.title_zh: 苹果将跳过高端 M6 芯片，转而推出以 AI 为核心的 M7 系列
items.summary_en: Apple plans to skip the high-end M6 chips in favor of an AI-focused M7 family (Pro/Max/Ultra). The move signals a pivot to heavy AI workloads on Mac hardware, likely incorporating stronger ML accelerators and memory bandwidth to support on-device inference and large-model workflows, with implications for developers targeting macOS.
items.summary_zh: 苹果计划跳过高端 M6 芯片，改为以 AI 为核心的 M7 系列（Pro/Max/Ultra）。这一举动表明将把 Mac 硬件定位于高强度 AI 工作负载，可能集成更强的机器学习加速单元与更高的内存带宽，为本地推理和大模型工作流提供支持，对开发者生态有重要影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: OpenKnowledge – open source AI-first alternative to Obsidian/Notion
items.title_zh: OpenKnowledge — 开源 AI 优先的 Obsidian/Notion 替代
items.summary_en: OpenKnowledge is an open-source knowledge-management app designed as an AI-first alternative to Obsidian and Notion. It emphasizes local-first data, AI-assisted notes and linking, and user control over privacy.
items.summary_zh: OpenKnowledge 是一个开源知识管理应用，定位为 Obsidian/Notion 的 AI 优先替代方案，强调本地优先的数据存储、AI 辅助的笔记与链接，以及对数据隐私的控制。

items.title_en: Hey Nico, you didn't vibe code your data room but stole it from Papermark
items.title_zh: 嘿 Nico，你没有为数据房写代码却从 Papermark 偷来
items.summary_en: An accusation that Nico didn’t code his data room but copied it from Papermark, highlighting the importance of provenance and originality in data tooling. The thread serves as a cautionary note on attribution, tooling trust, and the risks of reusing others' work without proper credit.
items.summary_zh: 有人指控 Nico 没有自己实现数据房的代码，而是抄袭自 Papermark，这凸显了数据工具中来源证明与署名的重要性。此事强调在工具生态中对原创性和 attribution 的信任风险，以及对他人工作未正确致谢的潜在后果。

items.title_en: Un-0: Generating Images with Coupled Oscillators
items.title_zh: Un-0：用耦合振荡器生成图像
items.summary_en: A hardware-oriented approach to image generation using coupled oscillators challenges the dominance of neural nets and diffusion models. The project showcases how physical dynamics can produce visuals, offering a potential path to efficient, low-latency generators and new hardware-software co-design opportunities.
items.summary_zh: 通过耦合振荡器的物理动态来生成图像，挑战了神经网络和扩散模型的主导地位。该方法展示了利用物理系统产生图像的可能性，为实现低延迟、节能的生成方法以及软硬件协同设计打开了新路径。

items.title_en: Texas Man Gets 30 Years in Prison for Transporting 'Anti-Government' Pamphlets
items.title_zh: 德州男子因运送反政府传单获刑30年
items.summary_en: Reason reports a Texas man receiving a 30-year sentence for transporting anti-government pamphlets, a case that raises questions about free speech limits and prosecutorial reach.
items.summary_zh: Reason报道一名德州男子因运送反政府传单被判处30年监禁，此案引发对言论自由边界与检控范围的讨论。

items.title_en: Anthropic says Alibaba illicitly extracted Claude AI model capabilities
items.title_zh: Anthropic称阿里巴巴非法提取Claude AI模型能力
items.summary_en: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of illicitly extracting Claude's capabilities, alleging IP theft and copying of proprietary model features. The claim highlights tensions over access to foundation-model technology and could affect licensing, partnerships, and regulatory scrutiny as Alibaba expands its AI stack. If proven, it could spur litigation and reshape cross-border AI collaboration.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 指控阿里巴巴非法提取 Claude 模型的能力，指控涉及知识产权和对专有特征的盗取。此举凸显基础模型领域对接入方式的激烈竞争和潜在法律风险，可能影响许可、伙伴关系及合规审查。若指控成立，可能引发诉讼并重塑跨境 AI 合作格局。

items.title_en: OS9Map
items.title_zh: OS9Map
items.summary_en: OS9Map offers a visual map related to the OS9 ecosystem, helping users navigate its components.
items.summary_zh: OS9Map 提供了一个与 OS9 相关的可视化地图，帮助用户浏览其组件与结构。

items.title_en: Zig's new bitCast semantics and LLVM back end improvements
items.title_zh: Zig 的 BitCast 语义与 LLVM 后端改进
items.summary_en: The Zig language project updates BitCast semantics and LLVM backend. The changes aim to make bit-level casts safer and more predictable while improving code generation and optimization on the LLVM backend, helping Zig reach more production-grade use cases.
items.summary_zh: 开发团队对 Zig 的 BitCast 语义进行了更新，并对 LLVM 后端进行了改进。修改旨在让位运算强制转换更安全、行为更可预测，同时提升 LLVM 后端的代码生成和优化能力，推动 Zig 在生产环境中的应用。

items.title_en: An oral history of Bank Python (2021)
items.title_zh: Bank Python（2021）的口述历史
items.summary_en: This oral history recounts the 2021 Bank Python project, capturing the people, decisions, and technical challenges behind its fintech ambitions. It offers lessons on collaboration, security, and rapid iteration in a fintech startup culture.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 2021 年的 Bank Python 项目，记录团队成员、关键决策与技术挑战，以及金融科技初创团队在协作、安全性与快速迭代中的经验教训。

items.title_en: The Doorman's Fallacy in action
items.title_zh: 看门人谬论在现实中的应用
items.summary_en: The Doorman's Fallacy in action shows how a single gatekeeper or simplistic access check can give a false sense of security, leaving deeper flaws unchecked. It uses real-world examples—security design, UX, and policy—to illustrate why layering, threat modeling, and provenance matter.
items.summary_zh: 看门人谬论在现实中的应用揭示了依赖单一门控或过于简单的访问检查，可能让人产生虚假的安全感而忽略更深层的漏洞。通过真实世界的例子，说明层次化防护、威胁建模和来源可追溯性的重要性。

items.title_en: Parallel Parentheses Matching
items.title_zh: 并行括号匹配
items.summary_en: The post presents a parallel approach to matching parentheses, illustrating how concurrency ideas can speed up a classic parsing problem. It highlights trade-offs in synchronization and workload distribution relevant to compilers and text-processing pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 文中给出一种并行化的括号匹配思路，展示并发如何加速这一经典解析问题。讨论了同步与任务分配的权衡，对编译器和文本处理流水线具有现实意义。

items.title_en: Political bias in AI: Where the AI models stand
items.title_zh: AI 中的政治偏见：模型现状
items.summary_en: A study from trakkr.ai assesses political bias across leading AI models, showing varying tendencies and how prompts and data shape outputs. It discusses mitigation strategies and implications for governance.
items.summary_zh: 这份分析评估了当代 AI 模型在政治偏见方面的差异，揭示了不同模型对政治立场的偏向程度及 prompts 的影响。文章还探讨了数据筛选、对齐策略在缓解偏见方面的作用与局限。

items.title_en: How much? The hidden costs of restaurant dishes
items.title_zh: 多少钱？餐馆菜品的隐藏成本
items.summary_en: The Guardian piece highlights hidden costs in restaurant pricing—service charges, taxes, and ingredient surcharges—arguing for clearer labeling and policy scrutiny.
items.summary_zh: 文章揭示餐厅定价中的隐藏成本，如服务费、税费和原材料附加费，呼吁更清晰的标注与政策审查。

items.title_en: The unbearable cheapness of open weight models
items.title_zh: 开源权重模型的难以承受的便宜
items.summary_en: The Unbearable Cheapness of Open Weight Models argues that while open-weight LLMs dramatically reduce runtime API costs and vendor lock-in, there are hidden costs in compute, energy, governance, and safety. Open weights enable experimentation but shift responsibility to maintain and secure models.
items.summary_zh: 《开源权重模型的难以承受的便宜》指出，开源权重模型虽然显著降低运行成本和对供应商的依赖，但也带来计算、能耗、治理与安全等隐性成本。开放权重促成更多实验，却把维护与安全责任转移到用户端。

items.title_en: Medical students are using popular research tool to pump out misleading studies
items.title_zh: 医学生利用热门研究工具炮制误导性研究
items.summary_en: Medical students are allegedly using a popular research tool to generate misleading studies, exposing vulnerabilities in how easily AI-assisted or automated tools can distort medical literature. The incident underscores the need for stronger verification, education, and safeguards in research workflows.
items.summary_zh: 据称医学生在流行的研究工具中快速生成误导性研究，暴露了 AI 辅助工具对医学文献造成扭曲的风险。此事强调需要加强核查、教育与研究工作流中的安全防护。

items.title_en: Show HN: Turn native language audio into flashcards and shadowing practice
items.title_zh: Show HN：将母语音频转化为单词卡和跟读练习
items.summary_en: Lingochunk offers a tool that converts native-language audio into flashcards and shadowing prompts for language learning. It enables rapid creation of practice material from real conversations, lowering barrier to immersion.
items.summary_zh: Lingochunk 提供的工具可将母语对话音频转化为单词卡和跟读练习材料，使学习者能够从真实对话中快速生成练习内容，降低沉浸式学习的门槛。

items.title_en: You can't unit test for taste
items.title_zh: 你不能用单元测试来评估口味
items.summary_en: A provocative take arguing that taste is subjective and utterly not amenable to unit tests. The piece suggests focusing on objective signals and user outcomes instead of chasing 'favorable' taste in software design, as taste evolves with context.
items.summary_zh: 文章直指口味本质的主观性，认为无法通过单元测试来衡量。作者建议在软件设计中以客观信号和用户实际效果为核心，而不是去追求所谓的“好口味”，因为口味会随情境改变。

items.title_en: Mixing Visual and Textual Code
items.title_zh: 混合可视化与文本代码
items.summary_en: The arXiv paper explores combining visual representations with textual code to improve comprehension and collaboration in programming. It discusses design considerations, benefits, and potential pitfalls of hybrid code modalities.
items.summary_zh: 这篇论文探讨用视觉表示与文本代码相结合来提升编程的理解与协作，讨论了混合代码形式的设计要点、潜在好处以及可能的风险。

items.title_en: Oxide computer 3D rack guided tour
items.title_zh: Oxide Computer 的三维机架导览
items.summary_en: Take a guided 3D tour of Oxide Computer’s racks, highlighting modular, high-density compute nodes designed for data-center workloads. The walkthrough emphasizes integrated cooling, dense interconnects, and software-defined hardware, illustrating the direction toward compact, purpose-built infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 通过三维导览了解 Oxide Computer 的机架系统，展示模块化、面向数据中心工作负载的高密度计算节点，以及集成散热和密集互连。此举体现了向紧凑、以软件定义硬件为核心的基础设施演进趋势。

items.title_en: A game where you're an OS and have to manage processes, memory and I/O events
items.title_zh: 你就是操作系统的游戏：管理进程、内存与 I/O 事件
items.summary_en: This game puts you in the role of an OS kernel, forcing you to schedule processes, manage memory, and handle I/O events. It crystallizes core concepts of OS design and can serve as a hands-on lab for students and hobbyists to grasp how systems orchestrate tasks.
items.summary_zh: 玩家扮演操作系统内核，需完成进程调度、内存管理与 I/O 事件处理等任务。这款游戏将操作系统设计的核心概念变成直观的实践，适合作为学生和爱好者的动手实验。

items.title_en: Advanced Nintendo Entertainment System (ANES) – NES Modded to Use 2 PPUs
items.title_zh: ANES：改装 NES 使用两颗 PPU
items.summary_en: ANES modded NES adds a second PPU to boost graphics capabilities, enabling more advanced rendering and effects beyond the stock hardware. It showcases enthusiastic retro hardware hacking and pushes the boundaries of what 8-bit systems can display.
items.summary_zh: ANES 将 NES 改装，增加第二颗 PPU，以提升图形能力，实现比原始硬件更复杂的渲染效果，体现了复古硬件爱好者的技术热情与创新。

items.title_en: GloriousEggroll's Proton has been rebased on Proton 11
items.title_zh: GloriousEggroll 的 Proton 11 重基
items.summary_en: Proton GE’s rebasing onto Proton 11 signals improved compatibility and performance for Windows games on Linux via Steam Play. The update reflects ongoing community-driven improvements that broaden the Linux gaming landscape and reduce compatibility frictions.
items.summary_zh: GloriousEggroll 将 Proton 重基到 Proton 11，带来对 Linux 上 Steam Play 的更多游戏兼容性与性能提升。这类社区驱动的持续改进正在扩展 Linux 游戏生态，降低兼容性摩擦。

items.title_en: Show HN: Chess-Inspired Roguelike
items.title_zh: 以棋为灵感的 Roguelike 游戏
items.summary_en: This Show HN introduces a roguelike that borrows chess-inspired mechanics, mapping piece movement and capture rules into dungeon navigation and combat. The design demonstrates how classic board-game concepts can reframe turn-based exploration and strategy in roguelikes.
items.summary_zh: 这款 Show HN 将棋子走法与棋子规则融入 Roguelike 的地牢探索与战斗之中，提供新颖的策略体验。通过将棋类概念映射到回合制玩法，展示了棋盘游戏思路在 Rogue 类游戏中的再应用。

items.title_en: The disappearance of Japan's animators
items.title_zh: 日本动画师的消失
items.summary_en: The Economist reports a troubling exodus of Japan's animators driven by low pay, long hours, and outsourcing pressures. The piece maps how talent drain threatens production pace, quality, and the future of domestic animation.
items.summary_zh: 《经济学人》报道日本动画师大量流失，原因包括低薪、长工时和外包压力。文章分析了人才外流对产出速度、质量以及日本动漫产业未来的影响。

items.title_en: Tw-fade: pure CSS scroll-driven edge masking
items.title_zh: Tw-fade：纯 CSS 滚动驱动的边缘遮罩
items.summary_en: Tw-fade demonstrates a pure CSS technique for scroll-driven edge masking, enabling subtle fade effects on scroll without JavaScript. It showcases how CSS variables and lightweight techniques can deliver dynamic UI polish with zero script.
items.summary_zh: Tw-fade 展示了一种纯 CSS 的滚动驱动边缘遮罩实现，滚动时可以实现微妙的渐变效果，无需 JavaScript。通过 CSS 变量等轻量化方法，展示了无需脚本即可实现的动态 UI 优雅度。

items.title_en: The last Romans are still around
items.title_zh: 最后的罗马人仍在身边
items.summary_en: Remnants of the Roman era continue to influence modern culture, law, and infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 罗马时代的影响仍在现代文化、法律和基础设施中延续。

items.title_en: RRB-Trees: Efficient Immutable Vectors (2012) [pdf]
items.title_zh: RRB-树：高效的不可变向量（2012）
items.summary_en: This paper introduces RRB-Trees, a persistent data structure that offers fast immutable vectors and efficient concatenation. It underpins functional programming languages and informs modern persistent collection implementations.
items.summary_zh: 这篇论文介绍了 RR-Tree，一种高效的不可变向量数据结构，支持快速拼接和修改保留原状态。它奠定了函数式编程语言中持久化集合实现的理论与实践基础。

items.title_en: The annotated PyTorch training loop
items.title_zh: 带注释的 PyTorch 训练循环
items.summary_en: A detailed annotated PyTorch training loop clarifies data flow, loss calculation, backprop, and optimization with practical notes. It helps readers understand common pitfalls like gradient issues, device placement, and debugging training runs.
items.summary_zh: 这篇带注释的 PyTorch 训练循环清晰分解了数据流、损失、反向传播和优化步骤，并给出实践注释。对理解梯度累积、设备放置和训练调试等细节很有帮助。

items.title_en: Record type inference for dummies
items.title_zh: 给初学者的记录类型推断入门
items.summary_en: An accessible primer demystifies how Haskell infers record types, including common pitfalls and practical examples. It helps readers understand label scoping, polymorphism, and how type inference behaves in real code.
items.summary_zh: 这篇易懂的入门解释了Haskell在记录类型推断方面的原理，包含常见误区与实例。帮助读者理解标签作用域、多态性，以及实际代码中的推断行为。

items.title_en: 22-year-old Mozart's handwritten notebook unearthed in 'major discovery'
items.title_zh: 22岁莫扎特的手写笔记被发现：重大发现
items.summary_en: A newly unearthed handwritten notebook from Mozart, dated when he was 22, promises fresh insights into his compositional process and early works.
items.summary_zh: 挖掘出22岁时莫扎特的手写笔记，为研究他的创作过程与早期作品提供新线索。该发现料将推动学者和演绎者重新解读其音乐文本。

items.title_en: Doing a masters while working in Spain
items.title_zh: 在西班牙工作同时攻读硕士学位
items.summary_en: Balancing work in Spain with pursuing a master's degree is feasible with the right program choices and planning.
items.summary_zh: 在西班牙工作的人同时攻读硕士学位是可行的，需要选对课程、做好时间规划。文章讨论了课程形式、签证与工作安排等实际要点，以及在线与现场学习的权衡。

items.title_en: Eyewitness at the Triangle (1911)
items.title_zh: 1911年三角火灾的目击者
items.summary_en: Recounts an eyewitness account from the 1911 Triangle Shirtwaist Factory fire, illustrating the human side of a pivotal event in labor history and its role in spurring reforms.
items.summary_zh: 回顾1911年三角厂火灾的现场目击者叙述，展现这一事件的人性一面及其推动劳工改革的历史影响。

items.title_en: My Steam Machine Is a 50ft HDMI Cable
items.title_zh: 我的 Steam 机是一根50英尺的 HDMI 线
items.summary_en: Long HDMI cables can introduce latency and signal integrity challenges, and the post chronicles a playful setup where a Steam machine is connected via a 50-foot HDMI link. It offers practical takeaways for hobbyists about approaching extreme cable runs and alternative streaming options.
items.summary_zh: 作者以玩味的口吻记录用一条50英尺HDMI线搭建Steam机的尝试，聚焦信号损耗与延迟等现实问题。文章给出对极限距离布线的实际要点，以及对爱好者的替代方案与实现注意事项。

items.title_en: Experiments in Sports Seismology for the World Cup
items.title_zh: 世界杯赛事中的运动地震学实验
items.summary_en: Researchers describe experiments using seismic sensors to study World Cup events, capturing crowd-induced vibrations and other signals. The work reveals how human activity translates into measurable ground motion and can inform safety and event analytics.
items.summary_zh: 研究团队介绍在世界杯赛期间使用地震仪进行实验，记录观众带来的振动与其他信号。此类研究揭示人类活动如何转化为可测量的地表数据，并可用于安全与事件分析。

items.title_en: SOCKMAP - TCP splicing of the future
items.title_zh: SOCKMAP：未来的 TCP 拼接
items.summary_en: Cloudflare introduces SOCKMAP as a future-ready approach to TCP splicing, aiming to reduce latency and streamline socket handling across connections. If adopted widely, it could impact high-performance networking and edge compute workloads.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 推出 SOCKMAP，作为面向未来的TCP拼接方案，旨在降低延迟、简化跨连接的套接字处理。若广泛采用，可能改变高性能网络与边缘计算的工作负载。
